summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented: the default for the boolean backing the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" field is set to true in DEFAULT_INPUTS, and URL parsing now explicitly checks for presence of `res6y` so `res6y=false` overrides the new default while keeping the `res6y` key. The diff also includes additional, unrelated changes (not requested) around an `industryGrowthPercent/indGrowth` field and project state bookkeeping.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/introduced an `industryGrowthPercent` input field and associated `indGrowth` URL query parameter handling (plus related parsing/encoding), which is not part of the requested change.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks to default the existing "Result Updated Since 6 Months" to Yes and ensure `res6y=false` is respected; it does not request adding new input fields or URL params.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (mentions "new indGrowth parameter" and "new industryGrowthPercent field")

hallucinated_features.description: Updated `project_state.json` with new_feature_requests entries (AR-1/AR-2/AR-3) unrelated to app runtime behavior requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not ask for any project state tracking file updates.
